chapter_title.ar: باب مِيرَاثِ ذَوِي الْأَرْحَامِ مَعَ الْمَوَالِي
chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 – Inheritance of the relatives with the Mawali (slave)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/199)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/199)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ عَلِيّاً ( عليه السلام ) لَمْ يَكُنْ يَأْخُذُ مِيرَاثَ أَحَدٍ مِنْ مَوَالِيهِ إِذَا مَاتَ وَ لَهُ قَرَابَةٌ كَانَ يَدْفَعُ إِلَى قَرَابَتِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa Bin Ubeyd, from Yunus Bin Abdul Rahman, from Zur’at, from Sama’at who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said that Ali<sup>asws</sup> never used to take the inheritance of anyone from his<sup>asws</sup> Mawali upon his death and there was a relative of his. He<sup>asws</sup> used to hand it over to his relatives’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his Muhammad ibn ‘Isa ibn ‘Ubayd from Yunus ibn ‘Abd al-Rahman from Zur’ah from Sama‘ah who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, did not take the legacy of any of his Mawali upon their death; instead if he had a relative he (the Imam) would give it to them/”
